semantic.role: Protocol type definitions for language detection and support snapshots.
responsibilities: Define the shape of a language detection snapshot (LanguageSnapshot), including schema version, detected file extensions, and per-language support status.
Define the LanguageSupport interface describing the support status (available, unavailable, unsupported) along with optional reason.
Define the LanguageDelta interface representing changes between two language snapshots.
outOfScope: Language detection or AST extraction logic.
Runtime validation or serialization of these types.
invariants: Interfaces in this file are part of the public protocol and must not be prefixed with 'I' (the internal prefix rule applies only to non-exported interfaces).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish the type-level contract for language discovery and support status used across the ArchSpine system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era.

publicSurface.description: Container for the complete state of language detection: schema version, detected extensions, and a map of language support records.
Describes the detection status of a single language (available, unavailable, unsupported) with an optional explanation string.
Represents the difference between two language snapshots, used to propagate changes in language support.

English.role: Protocol type definitions for language detection and support snapshots.
responsibilities: Define the shape of a language detection snapshot (LanguageSnapshot), including schema version, detected file extensions, and per-language support status.
Define the LanguageSupport interface describing the support status (available, unavailable, unsupported) along with optional reason.
Define the LanguageDelta interface representing changes between two language snapshots.
outOfScope: Language detection or AST extraction logic.
Runtime validation or serialization of these types.
